title: ficus emodi
intro: Ficus emodi, also known as Indian banyan, is a deciduous tree species native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Ficus emodi include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Ficus emodi is often prepared as herbal tea, powder, or oil, and can be used topically or internally to leverage its medicinal properties.
